name: Cat Escape 2026
description: Ready for a purr-fect adventure? Help your cute cat escape from the guards in Cat Escape 2026! Tiptoe through exciting levels, hide in boxes, and avoid getting caught. Collect coins to unlock funny costumes and enjoy hours of relaxing yet challenging gameplay. It’s simple, fun, and impossible to put down. Web Dev https://www.kizi.com.es/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
